{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45076", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Impact

In federated rooms, malicious homeservers can craft room events in such a way that prevents Synapse from providing full history to paginating clients.

Clients could therefore fail to display room history.

### Patches

Update to Synapse 1.152.1 or later.

### Workarounds

There are no known workarounds for this issue.

### Identifiers

- ELEMENTSEC-2025-1636

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, please email us at [security at element.io](mailto:security@element.io).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "html_url": "https://github.com/element-hq/synapse/security/advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45076"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-08T13:54:19Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/38398653?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/reivilibre", "id": 38398653, "login": "reivilibre", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM4Mzk4NjUz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/reivilibre", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Synapse pagination Denial of Service", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T19:44:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/element-hq/synapse/security-advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "matrix-synapse"}, "patched_versions": "1.152.1", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.152.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Synapse pagination Denial of Service
